items.title: Codex is very good.
items.description: Codex is very good. I'm especially impressed by how it uses the browse to test its own work. But any design related / frontend tasks, Claude still wins.
items.description_zh: 法典非常好。它如何使用浏览器来测试自己的工作给我留下了特别深刻的印象。但任何设计相关/前端任务，克劳德仍然获胜。

meta.bio: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people | Join 140K+ readers at https://t.co/XYKT…

items.title: You have to think of tokenmaxxing as eating crab legs at the buffet.
items.title_zh: 你必须把代币最大化想象成在自助餐上吃蟹腿。
items.description: You have to think of tokenmaxxing as eating crab legs at the buffet. The buffet (all you can eat AI plans) is not going to last forever so you better eat all the crab legs while you still can.
items.description_zh: 你必须把代币最大化想象成在自助餐上吃蟹腿。自助餐（人工智能计划）不会永远持续下去，所以你最好趁还能吃的时候吃掉所有的蟹腿。

items.title: What used to feel like procrastination (building systems instead of the MVP) is now a pre…
items.title_zh: 过去感觉像是拖延的事情（构建系统而不是 MVP）现在变成了……
items.description: What used to feel like procrastination (building systems instead of the MVP) is now a prerequisite to ship effectively with AI agents. My number 1 lesson from @ryancarson: "We used to say just do the bare minimum to get the MVP out. Don't…
items.description_zh: 过去感觉像是拖延的事情（构建系统而不是 MVP）现在已成为使用 AI 代理有效交付的先决条件。我从 @ryancarson 那里得到的第一课是：“我们过去常说，只要做最少的事情就能获得 MVP。不要……

items.title: I haven't written a personal blog post in over 5 years so if you see posts that claim to…
items.title_zh: 我已经 5 年多没有写过个人博客文章了，所以如果您看到声称……的帖子
items.description: I haven't written a personal blog post in over 5 years so if you see posts that claim to be written by me, they're not. I'll update if this ever changes. Maybe it should.
items.description_zh: 我已经有 5 年多没有写过个人博客文章了，所以如果您看到声称是我写的帖子，那它们不是我写的。如果情况发生变化，我会更新。也许应该如此。

items.title: The CEO of Goldman Sachs is taking the other side on the pessimistic takes on AI and jobs.
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官对人工智能和就业持悲观态度。
items.description: The CEO of Goldman Sachs is taking the other side on the pessimistic takes on AI and jobs. If you looked at what work looked like a few decades ago and saw how much faster everything is or easier it is to produce the same thing as before -…
items.description_zh: 高盛首席执行官对人工智能和就业持悲观态度。如果你看看几十年前的工作是什么样子，就会发现一切都快了多少，或者生产与以前相同的东西是多么容易——……

items.title: By evals I mean literally tell the agent: given what we discussed about what we are doing…
items.title_zh: 我所说的评估实际上是告诉代理：鉴于我们讨论了我们正在做的事情......
items.description: By evals I mean literally tell the agent: given what we discussed about what we are doing and why and what happened, use three different frontier models to look at inputs and outputs of your skill file calling the code, and rate it on effe…
items.description_zh: 通过评估，我的意思是字面上告诉代理：鉴于我们讨论了我们正在做什么以及为什么以及发生了什么，使用三种不同的前沿模型来查看调用代码的技能文件的输入和输出，并对其进行评级......

meta.bio: VC at @FirstMarkCap. Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.

items.title: It’s hilarious how many people DM me every week asking “aren’t you a VC, why are you buil…
items.title_zh: 有趣的是，每周都有多少人私信我问“你不是风投吗，你为什么要建造......
items.description: It’s hilarious how many people DM me every week asking “aren’t you a VC, why are you building”.. Brother, the space is moving so fast that the only way you can learn and stay at the frontier is by building. Priors need to be rethought ever…
items.description_zh: 有趣的是，每周都有多少人私信我问“你不是风投吗，你为什么要建造”。兄弟，这个领域发展得如此之快，你学习和保持前沿的唯一方法就是建造。需要重新考虑优先事项……

items.title: OpenClaw's dependency purge continues.
items.title_zh: OpenClaw 的依赖清除仍在继续。
items.description: OpenClaw's dependency purge continues. Killed Sharp and Jimp. Replaced it with photon, a small WebAssembly that runs compiled Rust for image processing. 2MB vs 140MB. https://t.co/tSimX2GKwP
items.description_zh: OpenClaw 的依赖清除仍在继续。杀死了夏普和吉普。将其替换为 photon，这是一个运行编译后的 Rust 进行图像处理的小型 WebAssembly。 2MB 与 140MB。 https://t.co/tSimX2GKwP

meta.bio: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take o…

items.title: Folks: when you write skills, ask your agent to be token efficient, relax grammer.
items.title_zh: 各位：当你写技巧的时候，要求你的代理要高效，放松语法。
items.description: Folks: when you write skills, ask your agent to be token efficient, relax grammer. I see too many skills that write books in the skill description, and all that crap is loaded into every context. I wrote a skill that finds the worst offend…
items.description_zh: 各位：当你写技巧的时候，要求你的代理要高效，放松语法。我在技能描述中看到太多写书的技能，而所有这些废话都被加载到每个上下文中。我写了一个发现最严重冒犯的技能......
